nodes.summary: Unit tests for MatchCharts component, testing bar chart and radar chart rendering with player comparison data.
Unit tests for MatchChatPanel component, testing mobile/desktop chat views and notification sounds.
Unit tests for MatchIntroOverlay component, testing duel/FFA layouts and loading progress.
Unit tests for MobileBuildSheet component, testing building/unit production UI on mobile.
Unit tests for ProfileCharts component, testing ELO history, win/loss charts, and activity charts.
Unit tests for RegionPanel component, testing building/unit display, build actions, and tab navigation.
Unit tests for TutorialOverlay component, testing step display, navigation, and skip functionality.
Unit tests for VoicePanel component, testing voice chat join/leave and mic toggle states.
Reusable auth layout component with branding, card container, and alt-link footer for login/register pages.
Auth page layout wrapper with logo, card, and alternate action link.
Google and Discord OAuth login buttons with loading states and social auth URL redirect.
Renders Google and Discord OAuth buttons, handles redirect to provider auth URL.
Chat text input with send button, character limit (500), and Enter key handling.
Controlled text input for chat messages with Enter-to-send and 500-char limit.
Floating chat widget with global chat and DM tabs, unread badges, and real-time messaging via WebSocket.
Direct message conversation view with message loading, real-time updates, and send functionality.
Main floating chat widget with global/DM tabs, unread counts, and toggle button.
In-game match chat panel with mobile bottom sheet and desktop collapsible panel, notification sounds.
Match chat with mobile FAB + bottom sheet and desktop collapsible panel, tracks unread messages.
Scrollable message list component with auto-scroll, grouped messages by user, and timestamps.
Renders chat messages with user grouping, timestamps, and auto-scroll to bottom.
Voice chat panel showing connection state, mic controls, peer speaking indicators, and join/leave buttons.
Voice chat UI with mobile/desktop variants, mic toggle, peer list with speaking indicators.
Ability bar with radial cooldown sweeps, energy costs, level badges, boost indicators, and cosmetic icon overrides.
Memoized ability bar rendering sorted abilities and boosts with cooldown overlays and energy cost badges.
Individual ability button with radial cooldown SVG, remaining uses badge, level badge, and cosmetic icon resolution.
Generates SVG arc path string for radial cooldown sweep visualization.
Unit movement/attack action bar with unit type selection, slider for unit count, target allocation, and mobile/desktop layouts.
Memoized action bar for sending troops with unit type tabs, count slider, target chips, and confirm button.
Displays active boost pills (permanent and time-limited) with icons, percentage values, and remaining time.
Memoized boost display rendering permanent and timed boost pills with color-coded icons.
Build and unit production queue display with progress bars, desktop cards, and mobile compact icons.
Memoized build queue rendering building and unit production items with progress percentages.
Desktop-only combined chat and voice panel positioned at bottom-left of game view.
Desktop chat panel with collapsible message list and voice pill for in-game communication.
Diplomacy panel with peace proposal dialog supporting status quo and province return conditions.
Memoized diplomacy panel managing peace dialog state and war lookup for peace proposals.
Peace negotiation dialog with condition type selection (status quo / return provinces) and province checkboxes.
Main game HUD with clock, energy/AP stats, player ranking with diplomacy actions, incoming proposals, and capital protection timer.
Memoized main HUD showing clock, energy, AP, region/unit counts, ranking, diplomacy actions, and proposals.
Compact stat tile with icon and value for regions/units display.
Large prominent stat tile for energy/AP with low-value pulse animation.
Action points stat tile with progress bar and color-coded value based on AP level.
In-game notification system with animated toast pills, auto-dismiss, and useGameNotifications hook.
Hook managing game notification state with notify, dismiss, and clearAll functions.
Overlay rendering positioned notification pills below the capital selection banner.
Match intro overlay with GSAP animations, player cards (1v1 VS or FFA grid), and loading progress steps.
Full-screen match intro with animated player cards, VS text, progress bar, and GSAP entrance/exit transitions.
Player card with color-coded avatar circle, animated ping ring, username, and bot badge.
1v1 duel layout with left player, VS center, and right player.
Free-for-all grid layout showing all player cards in a 2-4 column grid.
Mobile build/production sheet with floating action buttons and bottom sheet for building and unit production.
Memoized mobile build sheet with FAB triggers, building/unit lists with lock states, levels, and energy costs.
Quick action bar for selected region with unit type selector, percent presets, building/production panels, and unit tooltips.
Desktop region info panel with tabs for info, build, and produce, showing region details, buildings, and unit production.
Memoized region panel with three tabs (info/build/produce) showing owned buildings, available constructions, and unit production.
Tutorial overlay with floating instruction card, progress dots, red pulsing pointer to UI elements, and step navigation.
Tutorial step display with floating card, progress bar, skip/back/next controls, and action-required indicator.
Animated red pointer that tracks a data-tutorial DOM element with pulsing border and bouncing arrow.
Weather and day/night phase indicator showing condition icons, labels, and gameplay modifier percentages.
Displays weather condition, day phase, and active gameplay modifiers (defense, chaos, energy, recruitment).
Loot crate opening modal with GSAP-animated strip roller, rarity-colored items, and reveal animation.
PixiJS game canvas with province rendering, terrain chunk loading, troop animations, ability effects, air transit, and weather overlays.
MapLibre GL game map with region markers, troop movement animations, building icons, ability effects, and cosmetic overrides.
Post-match statistics charts with comparison bar chart and radar chart for player performance metrics.
Match result charts with tab switching between comparison bar chart and radar chart of player stats.
Profile statistics charts with ELO history area chart, win/loss bar, and 14-day activity bar chart.
Profile charts with ELO history, win rate display with stacked bar, and daily activity chart.
Item icon resolver with SVG map for materials/crates/cosmetics/blueprints, prefix matching, and emoji fallback.
Renders item icon from SVG map lookup or emoji fallback based on item slug.
Resolves item slug to SVG path via exact match then prefix match, returns null if not found.
Avatar component wrapping base-ui Avatar primitive with size variants (sm/default/lg).
Badge component with CVA variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost).
Simple banned user badge component displaying a red 'Zbanowany' indicator.
Button component wrapping base-ui Button with CVA variants and sizes.
Card component set (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction, CardContent, CardFooter).
Chart infrastructure wrapping Recharts with theme-aware config, ChartContainer, ChartTooltip, and ChartLegend.
Dialog component wrapping base-ui Dialog with overlay, title, description, and close button.
Dropdown menu component wrapping base-ui Menu with items, checkboxes, radio groups, and submenus.
Hover card component wrapping base-ui Popover with trigger and content panels.
Styled text input component with consistent border and focus styles.
Form label component wrapping base-ui Field.Label.
Popover component wrapping base-ui Popover with trigger, anchor, and positioned content.
Horizontal/vertical separator component using base-ui Separator.
Sheet (side drawer) component with slide-in animation from left/right/top/bottom.
Sonner toast provider component configured with theme-aware styling.
Table component set (Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption).
Tabs component wrapping base-ui Tabs with styled tab list, trigger, and content.
E2E tests for authentication flows: login, register, and error handling with Playwright.
E2E tests for dashboard page including navigation, user info display, and matchmaking button.
Playwright test fixtures providing authenticated page context with stored auth state.
E2E tests for game page including map rendering, HUD display, and WebSocket connection.
E2E tests for matchmaking flow including queue join/leave, lobby, and match start.
React context for social WebSocket providing notification and direct message event handlers.
Hook to consume SocialSocketContext for notification and DM event subscriptions.
Unit tests for useAudio hook testing music playback, mute toggle, sound effects, and jingles.
Unit tests for useAuth hook testing login, register, logout, token refresh, and banned user handling.
Unit tests for useChat hook testing WebSocket chat connection, message handling, and DM tab management.
Unit tests for useGameSocket hook testing WebSocket game state sync, actions, and reconnection.
Unit tests for useMatchmaking hook testing queue join/leave, lobby state, and match creation.
Unit tests for usePushNotifications hook testing push subscription, permission handling, and dismissal.
Audio management hook with in-game music playlist, menu music, jingles (victory/defeat), sound effects with cooldown, and mute toggle.
Hook managing music playlist, menu music, jingles, sound effects with concurrency limits and cooldowns, and mute persistence.
Auth context provider and hook with JWT login, register, token refresh, banned user detection, and logout.
Auth context provider managing user state, JWT token refresh, login/register/logout, and ban detection.
Hook consuming AuthContext, throws if used outside AuthProvider.
Chat context provider with WebSocket global chat, DM tab management, unread tracking, and PoW-authenticated connection.
Chat context provider managing WebSocket chat connection with PoW auth, message dedup, unread counts, and DM tabs.
Hook consuming ChatContext, throws if used outside ChatProvider.
Core game WebSocket hook managing real-time game state (regions, players, effects, weather, diplomacy, air transit) with tick-based updates.
Matchmaking context/hook with queue management, lobby state, WebSocket connection, voice tokens, and session persistence.
Notifications hook for fetching, marking read, and handling real-time incoming notifications.
Hook managing notification list with fetch, mark read, mark all read, and incoming notification handler.
Push notification hook managing browser push subscription with VAPID key, permission state, and dismiss.
Hook managing Web Push subscription lifecycle with VAPID, service worker, and session-based dismiss.
Hook fetching pre-projected province shapes from backend API for PixiJS canvas rendering.
Hook fetching province shape polygons from /api/v1/geo/regions/shapes/ with optional match scoping.
